calendar.matters:
Petitioner Pilar Bell'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Petitioner Pilar Bell's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is off calendar. Order issued on December 30, 2015.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

Notice Of Hearing On Peition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Slote of Slote Links & Boreman, LLP telephone number 415-393-8012 for Petitioner.
Aspasia Papavassiliou of Office of The Attorney General telephone number 510-622-2199 for Respondent.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. The Court requested a proposed order from Mr. Slote which is to be provided to Ms. Papavasiliou. PETITIONER PILAR BELL'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is continued to January 4, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Ms. Papavassiliou may provide written responses/argument.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Notice Of Hearing On Peition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Continued To Dec-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITIONER PILAR BELL'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is continued to December 22, 2015 to be heard by Judge Goldsmith due to the recusal of Judge Kahn, who is handling the department 302 calendar on December 14, 2015.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
